title: Oxanthera undulata
taxonomy: Oxanthera undulata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Oxanthera and is native to the Himalayan region. Oxanthera undulata is a shrub or small tree that is found in the wild in the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant's classification is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its undulating leaves and fragrant flowers. Oxanthera undulata is an important part of the local ecosystem, providing food and shelter for various animals and insects.
